_comment: The single CLIENT tool BrailleBuddy uses. Recreate this in the ElevenLabs dashboard (Agent → Tools → Add tool → type: Client). The name MUST be exactly render_braille — it is matched case-sensitively to the function registered in apps/web/components/Conversation.tsx.
name: render_braille
description: Physically display text on the BrailleBuddy device, one Braille cell at a time, so the learner can feel each character. Call this whenever you want the learner to feel a letter, number, word, or short phrase. Pacing is controlled by the learner's speed knob, not by you.

parameters.description: The exact text to render in Braille — e.g. "a", "cat", or "hello world". Use plain letters, digits, spaces and simple punctuation.
